source_text_span: Overall responsibility for software security assigned to senior leadership. Senior leadership team establishes formal responsibility and authority for security of vendor's products and services
contextualised_text: Overall responsibility for software security assigned to senior leadership. Senior leadership team establishes formal responsibility and authority for security of vendor's products and services. Section 1

source_text_span: Software security responsibilities are assigned. Software security responsibilities clearly defined and assigned to appropriate individuals or teams including development personnel
contextualised_text: Software security responsibilities are assigned. Software security responsibilities clearly defined and assigned to appropriate individuals or teams including development personnel. Section 1

source_text_span: Software development personnel maintain skills in software security. Mature process for managing and maintaining software security skills; skills required for each role clearly defined; annual review
contextualised_text: Software development personnel maintain skills in software security. Mature process for managing and maintaining software security skills; skills required for each role clearly defined; annual review. Section 1

source_text_span: Regulatory and industry security and compliance requirements identified and monitored. Mature process to identify and monitor external regulatory and industry security and compliance requirements; reviewed annually
contextualised_text: Regulatory and industry security and compliance requirements identified and monitored. Mature process to identify and monitor external regulatory and industry security and compliance requirements; reviewed annually. Section 2

source_text_span: Software security policy defined and establishes rules and goals. Software security policy communicated to all vendor personnel; covers all control objectives; approved by senior leadership
contextualised_text: Software security policy defined and establishes rules and goals. Software security policy communicated to all vendor personnel; covers all control objectives; approved by senior leadership. Section 2

source_text_span: Formal software security strategy established and maintained. Strategy based on or aligned with industry-accepted methodologies; covers entire lifecycle; reviewed annually
contextualised_text: Formal software security strategy established and maintained. Strategy based on or aligned with industry-accepted methodologies; covers entire lifecycle; reviewed annually. Section 2

source_text_span: Software security assurance processes implemented throughout entire lifecycle. Security assurance processes defined, implemented and maintained; checkpoints throughout SDLC
contextualised_text: Software security assurance processes implemented throughout entire lifecycle. Security assurance processes defined, implemented and maintained; checkpoints throughout SDLC. Section 2

source_text_span: Evidence generated and maintained to demonstrate effectiveness of assurance processes. Evidence generated for each process to illustrate it results in expected security outcomes; frequently collected and kept up to date
contextualised_text: Evidence generated and maintained to demonstrate effectiveness of assurance processes. Evidence generated for each process to illustrate it results in expected security outcomes; frequently collected and kept up to date. Section 2

source_text_span: Failures in software security assurance processes detected and updated. Mature process to detect weak or ineffective assurance processes; criteria for determining weakness defined; processes updated when weak
contextualised_text: Failures in software security assurance processes detected and updated. Mature process to detect weak or ineffective assurance processes; criteria for determining weakness defined; processes updated when weak. Section 2

source_text_span: Critical assets are identified and classified. Mature process to identify and classify critical assets; CIA requirements for each defined; inventory maintained
contextualised_text: Critical assets are identified and classified. Mature process to identify and classify critical assets; CIA requirements for each defined; inventory maintained. Section 3

source_text_span: Threats to software and weaknesses continuously identified and assessed. Process to identify, assess, and monitor software threats and design weaknesses
contextualised_text: Threats to software and weaknesses continuously identified and assessed. Process to identify, assess, and monitor software threats and design weaknesses. Section 3

source_text_span: accounts for all inputs/outputs, data flows, trust boundaries
contextualised_text: accounts for all inputs/outputs, data flows, trust boundaries. Section 3

source_text_span: includes open-source components
contextualised_text: includes open-source components. Section 3

source_text_span: Software security controls implemented to mitigate threats and design weaknesses. Process for defining security requirements and implementing controls to mitigate threats; mitigation decisions recorded and approved
contextualised_text: Software security controls implemented to mitigate threats and design weaknesses. Process for defining security requirements and implementing controls to mitigate threats; mitigation decisions recorded and approved. Section 3

source_text_span: Failures in software security controls detected; weak controls updated or replaced. Mature process to identify weak or ineffective controls; criteria defined; monitoring throughout lifecycle; controls updated timely
contextualised_text: Failures in software security controls detected; weak controls updated or replaced. Mature process to identify weak or ineffective controls; criteria defined; monitoring throughout lifecycle; controls updated timely. Section 3

source_text_span: Existing and emerging software vulnerabilities detected in a timely manner. Mature process for security testing; tools appropriate for software architecture; testing throughout lifecycle including third-party; results inventoried
contextualised_text: Existing and emerging software vulnerabilities detected in a timely manner. Mature process for security testing; tools appropriate for software architecture; testing throughout lifecycle including third-party; results inventoried. Section 4

source_text_span: Newly discovered vulnerabilities fixed; reintroduction of similar vulnerabilities prevented. Process for distributing fixes and preventing reintroduction; criticality criteria defined; decisions to not fix approved and justified
contextualised_text: Newly discovered vulnerabilities fixed; reintroduction of similar vulnerabilities prevented. Process for distributing fixes and preventing reintroduction; criticality criteria defined; decisions to not fix approved and justified. Section 4

source_text_span: All changes to software identified, assessed, and approved. Process to identify, assess, and approve all changes
contextualised_text: All changes to software identified, assessed, and approved. Process to identify, assess, and approve all changes. Section 5

source_text_span: security impact analysis
contextualised_text: security impact analysis. Section 5

source_text_span: all decisions recorded
contextualised_text: all decisions recorded. Section 5

source_text_span: changes authorized by responsible personnel
contextualised_text: changes authorized by responsible personnel. Section 5

source_text_span: All software versions uniquely identified and tracked throughout lifecycle. Formal versioning system; unique identifiers in sequential manner; all changes associated with unique version
contextualised_text: All software versions uniquely identified and tracked throughout lifecycle. Formal versioning system; unique identifiers in sequential manner; all changes associated with unique version. Section 5

source_text_span: Integrity of all software code maintained throughout lifecycle. Process, mechanism and/or tools to protect integrity of software code including third-party components; unauthorized access detected and investigated
contextualised_text: Integrity of all software code maintained throughout lifecycle. Process, mechanism and/or tools to protect integrity of software code including third-party components; unauthorized access detected and investigated. Section 6

source_text_span: Software releases and updates delivered securely ensuring integrity. Mechanism to verify integrity of updated code during delivery; processes reasonable and appropriate; results in secure delivery
contextualised_text: Software releases and updates delivered securely ensuring integrity. Mechanism to verify integrity of updated code during delivery; processes reasonable and appropriate; results in secure delivery. Section 6

source_text_span: Sensitive production data only collected where legitimate business need. Process to record and authorize collection/retention of sensitive data; inventory maintained; decisions approved and justified
contextualised_text: Sensitive production data only collected where legitimate business need. Process to record and authorize collection/retention of sensitive data; inventory maintained; decisions approved and justified. Section 7

source_text_span: Sensitive production data protected when retained and securely deleted when not needed. Data protected when retained; securely deleted when no longer needed; deletion processes render data irretrievable
contextualised_text: Sensitive production data protected when retained and securely deleted when not needed. Data protected when retained; securely deleted when no longer needed; deletion processes render data irretrievable. Section 7

source_text_span: Software vendor provides secure implementation guidance to stakeholders. Guidance on secure implementation, configuration, and operation; documentation of all security-related configurable options
contextualised_text: Software vendor provides secure implementation guidance to stakeholders. Guidance on secure implementation, configuration, and operation; documentation of all security-related configurable options. Section 8

source_text_span: Secure implementation guidance includes detailed install/configure instructions. Detailed instructions on how to securely install, initialize, configure, and maintain software
contextualised_text: Secure implementation guidance includes detailed install/configure instructions. Detailed instructions on how to securely install, initialize, configure, and maintain software. Section 8

source_text_span: sufficiently detailed
contextualised_text: sufficiently detailed. Section 8

source_text_span: evidence of resulting secure configuration
contextualised_text: evidence of resulting secure configuration. Section 8

source_text_span: Secure implementation guidance aligned with software updates. Guidance updated when new software updates released or security-related options modified; reviewed at least annually
contextualised_text: Secure implementation guidance aligned with software updates. Guidance updated when new software updates released or security-related options modified; reviewed at least annually. Section 8

source_text_span: Communication channels defined for reporting and receiving security information. Bidirectional communication channels for security issues; stakeholders can report issues and receive timely updates; resources to respond
contextualised_text: Communication channels defined for reporting and receiving security information. Bidirectional communication channels for security issues; stakeholders can report issues and receive timely updates; resources to respond. Section 9

source_text_span: Stakeholders notified about security updates in a timely manner. Mature process exists to notify stakeholders about security updates in a timely manner
contextualised_text: Stakeholders notified about security updates in a timely manner. Mature process exists to notify stakeholders about security updates in a timely manner. Section 9

source_text_span: Mitigation instructions provided when security updates not readily available. Instructions for mitigating threat or reducing impact when timely patch not available; risk mitigation provided to stakeholders
contextualised_text: Mitigation instructions provided when security updates not readily available. Instructions for mitigating threat or reducing impact when timely patch not available; risk mitigation provided to stakeholders. Section 9

source_text_span: Change summary provided to stakeholders for all software updates. Mature process to communicate all software changes; clear summary of functionality impacted; change details accessible to stakeholders
contextualised_text: Change summary provided to stakeholders for all software updates. Mature process to communicate all software changes; clear summary of functionality impacted; change details accessible to stakeholders. Section 10
